# Upgrade Plan

## Overview
Upgrade to latest LTS versions including Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4.

## Tasks
See tasks.json for detailed task breakdown.

## Objectives
- Migrate to Java 21 (latest LTS)
- Upgrade to Spring Boot 3.4
- Update Spring Framework to 6.x
- Migrate javax.* packages to jakarta.* namespace if needed
- Ensure all dependencies are compatible with target versions
